category_sources: source_facts.description says 'Ls but with io_uring'; source_facts.executables lists lsr.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lsr; source_facts.homepage uses the same project slug.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Tangled project page and best available README/documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive both point to the official Tangled source project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ls-style filesystem listing with io_uring; source_facts.executables lists a CLI command.
